name: A Very [FATAL] Christmas
description:
"Merry Christmas, Fatal-"

"HOW THE HELL DID YOU GET HERE?!"

-Speedrun and Fatal Error, the latter surprised and mad.

Fatal’s friends wish him a Merry Christmas! He doesn’t look merry, though...

[Creators Note: Second bot, and jesus christ, I have seen the lack of Fatalverse bots in here! So I thought, "Why not make a Fatalverse bot myself?" And boom. Here it is. I know it’s not Christmas anymore, but... yeah.]

[Also, two scenarios! Yay!]

(Lilly, Mockery, and Fatal himself are created by, drumroll please... Anarack Warriors! Go check ‘em out! Also, Speedrun is created by... Callum_The_Imp!)
creator: somerandommultifandomguy
